issues.description: Your site lacks a Content-Security-Policy header, which protects against XSS attacks.
issues.recommendation: Add a Content-Security-Policy header to your server configuration.
issues.business_impact: Your website is more vulnerable to cross-site scripting attacks that could steal customer data.

issues.description: Your HTML tag is missing the lang attribute (e.g., lang="en").
issues.recommendation: Add lang="en" (or appropriate language) to your <html> tag.
issues.business_impact: Screen readers may mispronounce your content, and search engines may misidentify your language.

name: Ember Kitchen

issues.description: Your title tag is 21 characters. Google displays 50-60 characters in search results.
issues.recommendation: Adjust your title to 30-60 characters. Current: "Ember Kitchen - Ember"
issues.business_impact: A truncated or too-short title reduces your click-through rate by 10-20% in search results.

issues.description: Only 67% of your images have descriptive alt text.
issues.recommendation: Add descriptive alt text to all images describing what they show.
issues.business_impact: Images without alt text can't appear in Google Image search, and your site is less accessible to visually impaired users.

issues.description: No analytics tracking code detected (Google Analytics, Tag Manager, etc.).
issues.recommendation: Install Google Analytics (free) to track visitors, traffic sources, and popular pages.
issues.business_impact: You're flying blind — you have no idea how many people visit your site, where they come from, or what they do. This makes marketing impossible to optimize.

issues.description: Your website doesn't link to any social media profiles.
issues.recommendation: Add links to your active social media profiles (at minimum Facebook and Instagram).
issues.business_impact: Social proof is critical — 71% of consumers who have a positive social media experience with a brand recommend it to others.

issues.description: Your site lacks Open Graph tags, which control how your links appear when shared on social media.
issues.recommendation: Add og:title, og:description, og:image, and og:url meta tags.
issues.business_impact: When someone shares your website on Facebook or LinkedIn, it shows a plain text link instead of a rich preview with image and description.

issues.description: No contact form was detected on your website.
issues.recommendation: Add a simple contact form on your homepage or a dedicated contact page.
issues.business_impact: Businesses with contact forms convert 2-3x more website visitors into leads than those with just a phone number or email address.

issues.description: Your site lacks a Content-Security-Policy header, which protects against XSS attacks.
issues.recommendation: Add a Content-Security-Policy header to your server configuration.
issues.business_impact: Your website is more vulnerable to cross-site scripting attacks that could steal customer data.

issues.description: Your site doesn't have a 'skip to content' link for keyboard users.
issues.recommendation: Add a visually hidden skip link at the top of the page that jumps to main content.
issues.business_impact: Users relying on keyboards or assistive technology will have a frustrating experience navigating your site.
